positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map composition featuring geometric constellations and stylized astronomical elements (planets, moons, comets). The central design is a luminous crescent moon embraced by a flowing, abstract representation of stellar dust and faint, etched zodiac symbols. Use a modern, line-art aesthetic combined with deep, atmospheric color gradients. Color palette: midnight indigo, ethereal gold, subtle teal, and cream white. Composition must be centrally focused and scalable, designed as a repeat-friendly graphic. Strong contrast and clean silhouettes are paramount. Vector art quality, suitable for screen printing, highly detailed yet clean lines, cosmic vaporwave style.
